failedAssertions.reason: SampleApp contract verification is unstable: the canonical root test failed with four DI012b anchor mismatches between SampleApp/DI007 and SampleApp/DI009 even though a later focused verifier rerun passed.
Published SampleApp claims do not stay aligned with observed diagnostics on every validation run; the root test reported unexpected/missing DI012b claim anchors.
The canonical SampleApp sample-diagnostics contract is not stable because the root validation surface intermittently rejects the checked-in contract for DI012b anchor drift.
